SureScripts (a nationwide e-prescribing network). Information regarding credentials is self-reported by 
the provider. 

From this source data, CCW creates an array of academic or professional credentials associated with 
the provider during the year. We gave priority in this array to the types of credentials most likely to 
have prescribing privileges, the next priority was other medical credentials, and then other types of
